qa_pairs.question: What does RAS stand for?
qa_pairs.answer: RAS stands for Rapid Access Service.

qa_pairs.question: Who can access the Digital Research Alliance of Canada's Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: Any Digital Research Alliance of Canada user can access RAS as soon as they have an Alliance account.

qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: RAS allows users to experiment and start working right away with modest quantities of resources.

qa_pairs.question: What does RAC stand for?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC stands for Resource Allocation Competition.

qa_pairs.question: When should users apply for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: Users requiring larger resource quantities should apply to the annual Resource Allocation Competition (RAC).

qa_pairs.question: Can Primary Investigators (PIs) with an existing RAC allocation also request resources via RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Primary Investigators (PIs) with a current RAC allocation are also able to request resources via RAS.

qa_pairs.question: What are cloud instances also known as?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud instances are also known as virtual machines or VMs.

qa_pairs.question: What are the two main options available for cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: The two options available for cloud resources are Compute instances and Persistent instances.

qa_pairs.question: What is a characteristic of Compute instances regarding their lifespan?
qa_pairs.answer: Compute instances have a limited life-time, also known as wall-time.

qa_pairs.question: What are the typical CPU requirements for Compute instances?
qa_pairs.answer: Compute instances typically have constant high CPU requirements.

qa_pairs.question: What is another name sometimes used for Compute instances?
qa_pairs.answer: Compute instances are sometimes referred to as batch instances.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum wall-time for Compute instances?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum wall-time for Compute instances is one month.

qa_pairs.question: What happens when Compute instances reach their life-time limit?
qa_pairs.answer: Upon reaching their life-time limit, Compute instances will be scheduled for deactivation, and their owners will be notified to clean up and download data.

qa_pairs.question: Are grace periods for deactivation of Compute instances guaranteed?
qa_pairs.answer: Any grace period for deactivation of Compute instances is subject to resources availability at that time.

qa_pairs.question: What are Persistent instances designed to do regarding their run-time?
qa_pairs.answer: Persistent instances are meant to run indefinitely.

qa_pairs.question: What are some examples of services that would typically use Persistent instances?
qa_pairs.answer: Examples of services that would use Persistent instances include Web servers and database servers.

qa_pairs.question: How do Persistent instances generally compare to Compute instances in terms of CPU usage?
qa_pairs.answer: In general, Persistent instances use less CPU power than Compute instances.

qa_pairs.question: What type of GPUs does Arbutus currently offer for RAS use?
qa_pairs.answer: Arbutus currently offers H100 GPUs for RAS use.

qa_pairs.question: What is the specific flavour name for the H100 GPU offered for RAS use at Arbutus?
qa_pairs.answer: The specific flavour name is 'g1-12vgb-c3-35gb-125'.

qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications of the 'g1-12vgb-c3-35gb-125' vGPU flavour?
qa_pairs.answer: This flavour has 12GB GPU memory, 3 vCPUs, 35GB of memory, and 125GB of ephemeral storage.

qa_pairs.question: Are alternative GPU flavours available for RAC recipients?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, alternative GPU flavours are available for RAC recipients.

qa_pairs.question: Who can request both Compute and Persistent allocations to share a single project?
qa_pairs.answer: Users may request both a Compute and Persistent allocation to share a single project.

qa_pairs.question: What is the shared storage limit per PI when requesting both Compute and Persistent allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: Storage is shared between the two allocations and is limited to 10TB/PI per storage type.

qa_pairs.question: Who is eligible to request Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: Only PIs may request Compute instances under RAS.

qa_pairs.question: Who is eligible to request Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: Only PIs may request Persistent instances under RAS.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of vCPUs allowed for Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of vCPUs for Compute instances under RAS is 80.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of vCPUs allowed for Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of vCPUs for Persistent instances under RAS is 25.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of vGPUs allowed under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of vGPUs allowed under RAS is 1.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of instances for Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of instances for Compute instances under RAS is 20.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of instances for Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of instances for Persistent instances under RAS is 10.

qa_pairs.question: Is the instance limit under RAS a hard quota?
qa_pairs.answer: No, it is a metadata quota, not a hard limit, and users can request an increase beyond these values without a RAC request.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of volumes for Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of volumes for Compute instances under RAS is 2.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of volumes for Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of volumes for Persistent instances under RAS is 10.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of volume snapshots for Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of volume snapshots for Compute instances under RAS is 2.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of volume snapshots for Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of volume snapshots for Persistent instances under RAS is 10.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum RAM (GB) for Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum RAM for Compute instances under RAS is 300 GB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum RAM (GB) for Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum RAM for Persistent instances under RAS is 50 GB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of Floating IPs for both Compute and Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of Floating IPs for both Compute and Persistent instances under RAS is 2.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum Persistent storage (TB) allowed under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum Persistent storage allowed under RAS is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum Object storage (TB) allowed under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum Object storage allowed under RAS is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: Where is Object storage currently available, and under what conditions?
qa_pairs.answer: Object storage is currently only available at Arbutus and only available subject to RAC project requirements.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum Shared filesystem storage (TB) allowed under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum Shared filesystem storage allowed under RAS is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for Compute instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for Compute instances under RAS is 1 year, with a 1 month wall-time.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for Persistent instances under RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for Persistent instances under RAS is 1 year (renewable).

qa_pairs.question: When do renewals for cloud RAS allocations take effect?
qa_pairs.answer: Renewals for cloud RAS allocations will take effect in April.

qa_pairs.question: How many times can PIs request a 1-year renewal of their cloud RAS allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: PIs may request a 1-year renewal of their cloud RAS allocations an unlimited number of times.

qa_pairs.question: Are cloud RAS allocation renewals guaranteed?
qa_pairs.answer: No, cloud RAS allocation renewals are based on available resources and are not guaranteed.

qa_pairs.question: What is the typical duration for allocation requests made after January 1?
qa_pairs.answer: Requests made after January 1 will expire in March of the following year, potentially making them longer than 1 year.

qa_pairs.question: What is the typical duration for allocation requests made between May and December?
qa_pairs.answer: Allocation requests made between May-December will be less than 1 year.

qa_pairs.question: How can one request RAS?
qa_pairs.answer: To request RAS, please fill out the provided Google form.
